titles_tesim: A part of the Universal History of al-Manbigi
The text of prayers to be said for intending monks
Two Mimars by St. Ephraem the Syrian
names_tesim: Mahbūb ibn Qustantīn|~|Mahbūb ibn Constantine al‑Rūmī al‑Manbījī
contents_tesim: A part of the Universal History of al-Manbigi
Includes the stories of Martianus the Hermit, the lady who took a monk’s garb, and a person surnamed “God’s Man”
The text of prayers to be said for intending monks
Two Mimars by St. Ephraem the Syrian
